title: Sensory Toys for 1 Year Old Boys - Whack A Mole Game Baby Musical Toys Early Development Educational Activity Toy Gifts for 1 Year Olds Boys Girls Toddlers Kids
features: 8 IN 1 Multifunctional Musical Hammer Toy: The musical pounding toy comes with 8 game modes, such as whack-a-mole, holiday songs, light show, memory thinking, piano, lullaby, sound effects, and rhythm master; all functions have lights and sounds that cooperate with each other. Best learning educational toy for 1-3 years old kids

High-Quality Safe Material: This fun baby sensory toy is made of durable ABS plastic material is BPA-free, and has EN71, ASTM, and CPC certifications. All accessories are finely polished and smooth surfaces, have no burrs, and will not cut the baby's skin, the hammer with a soft rubber head is more suitable for toddlers to play

Whack a Mole Game: When starting the game, you can control the volume of the sound through the button, and press the switch button to select any mode, the lights of 7 different colors will change according to the game mode, the light is soft and not dazzling. It can help improve children's visual, language learning, and musical recognition ability. When the ball is not hit, it will make a sound to encourage the child to continue to challenge

Space Theme Design: This light-up musical toy is designed as UFO and spaceship, the peculiar design stimulates children's imagination and curiosity to explore space. Colorful balls help children recognize colors and explore colorful worlds. Lights and sound effects keep kids entertained and interested, and can exercise hand-eye coordination, brain development, teamwork, and more

Perfect Toddler Christmas Gift: Interactive pounding toys can increase parent-child interaction and start the family game of whack-a-mole, which can make children like this gift more. As a birthday and holiday gift (Children's Day, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving) for boys girls 1 2 3 4 5 years old, with a gift box (battery not included)
